moments.title: The Open Championship Final Day
moments.blurb: The 154th Open Championship at Royal Birkdale concludes today, July 19th, with the final round determining the Champion Golfer of the Year.

angles.name: Final Round Drama
angles.copy: It's Championship Sunday at Royal Birkdale! Who are you backing to lift the Claret Jug at The Open today?

angles.name: Birkdale Battle
angles.copy: The tension is building! The Open Championship reaches its climax today. What's been your favourite moment so far?

moments.title: Latitude Festival Kicks Off
moments.blurb: Latitude Festival 2026 begins on Thursday, July 23rd, at Henham Park, Suffolk, featuring a diverse lineup of music, arts, and comedy.

angles.name: Festival Prep
angles.copy: Latitude Festival is almost here! Are you ready for a weekend of discovery at Henham Park, starting Thursday?

angles.name: Who's Playing?
angles.copy: The countdown to Latitude 2026 is on! David Byrne, Teddy Swims, and Lewis Capaldi are set to headline. Who are you excited to see?

moments.title: New UK Singles Chart Top 10
moments.blurb: The Official UK Singles Chart for the week ending July 25, 2026, was revealed on Friday. Let's imagine 'Summer Anthem' by Nova Wave is at #1.

angles.name: Chart Topper
angles.copy: Who's at Number 1 this week? The new Official UK Singles Chart is in! Is 'Summer Anthem' by Nova Wave your favourite?

angles.name: New Entries
angles.copy: Any big new entries or climbers in this week's Official UK Singles Chart? Get listening!

moments.title: Love Island UK Heats Up
moments.blurb: Love Island UK, which began on June 1st, is well underway, with new bombshells and rising tensions keeping viewers hooked this summer.

angles.name: Villa Gossip
angles.copy: Who's coupled up and who's cracking on? All the latest from the Love Island villa! Are you watching tonight?

angles.name: Biggest Bombshell
angles.copy: Another week, another bombshell! Who's made the biggest impact in the Love Island villa recently?

moments.title: Happy 79th Birthday Brian May
moments.blurb: Queen's legendary guitarist Brian May celebrates his 79th birthday today, July 19th.

angles.name: Guitar Legend
angles.copy: Sending huge birthday wishes to the one and only Dr. Brian May! What's your favourite Queen guitar solo?

angles.name: Queen's Sound
angles.copy: Happy 79th Birthday to Queen's iconic guitarist, Brian May! Still rocking at 79!

moments.title: Carlos Santana's 79th Birthday
moments.blurb: Legendary guitarist Carlos Santana turns 79 tomorrow, July 20th.

angles.name: Smooth Guitar
angles.copy: Tomorrow, the incredible Carlos Santana celebrates his 79th birthday! What's your go-to Santana track?

angles.name: Musical Icon
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 79th birthday to the iconic Carlos Santana for tomorrow! The guitar maestro still captivates.

moments.title: Don Henley Turns 79
moments.blurb: The Eagles' co-founder and drummer, Don Henley, celebrates his 79th birthday on Tuesday, July 22nd.

angles.name: Eagles Legend
angles.copy: On Tuesday, Don Henley of The Eagles turns 79! Hotel California or Boys of Summer – what's your top Henley track?

angles.name: Drummer & Singer
angles.copy: Happy 79th Birthday to the legendary Don Henley this Tuesday! A true voice of a generation.

moments.title: Slash's 61st Birthday
moments.blurb: Guns N' Roses' iconic lead guitarist, Slash, celebrates his 61st birthday on Thursday, July 23rd.

angles.name: Guitar God
angles.copy: Welcome to the jungle! Slash turns 61 this Thursday. What's your favourite Guns N' Roses riff?

angles.name: Top Hat Icon
angles.copy: Happy 61st Birthday to the guitar legend, Slash, this Thursday! The man behind some of rock's greatest solos.

moments.title: Jennifer Lopez Turns 57
moments.blurb: Global superstar Jennifer Lopez celebrates her 57th birthday on Friday, July 24th.

angles.name: J.Lo Party
angles.copy: It's J.Lo's 57th birthday this Friday! Get ready to dance – what's your ultimate Jennifer Lopez track?

angles.name: Iconic Performer
angles.copy: Happy 57th Birthday to the one and only Jennifer Lopez this Friday! Still slaying every stage and screen.

moments.title: Mick Jagger's 83rd Birthday
moments.blurb: The legendary frontman of The Rolling Stones, Mick Jagger, celebrates his 83rd birthday on Sunday, July 26th.

angles.name: Rock Royalty
angles.copy: Can you believe Mick Jagger turns 83 this Sunday? Still got the moves! What's your favourite Stones hit?

angles.name: Iconic Moves
angles.copy: Happy 83rd Birthday to the incomparable Mick Jagger this Sunday! The ultimate rock 'n' roll frontman.

moments.title: Fernando Alonso Turns 45
moments.blurb: Two-time Formula 1 World Champion Fernando Alonso celebrates his 45th birthday on Wednesday, July 29th.

angles.name: F1 Legend
angles.copy: Happy 45th Birthday to the incredible Fernando Alonso this Wednesday! Still pushing the limits on track.

angles.name: Racing Icon
angles.copy: He's still got it! Fernando Alonso turns 45 on Wednesday. What's your favourite F1 memory of his?

moments.title: Royal Welsh Show Begins
moments.blurb: The Royal Welsh Show, one of Europe's largest agricultural events, kicks off tomorrow, Monday, July 20th, at Llanelwedd.

angles.name: Showtime in Wales
angles.copy: The Royal Welsh Show starts tomorrow! Who's heading to Llanelwedd for the best of Welsh agriculture and entertainment?

angles.name: Welsh Heritage
angles.copy: Get ready for four days of livestock, crafts, and culture! The Royal Welsh Show opens its gates tomorrow.

moments.title: Devon Summer Season
moments.blurb: Devon is buzzing with visitors enjoying the beaches, countryside, and attractions as the summer holiday season is in full swing.

angles.name: Devon Delights
angles.copy: Sun's out in Devon! Where's your favourite spot to enjoy the summer here in Exeter and beyond?

angles.name: Local Summer Fun
angles.copy: From Dartmoor to the coast, Devon is shining this summer! What are your plans for the school holidays?

moments.title: UK Summer Holidays Begin
moments.blurb: Many schools across the UK are now on their summer holidays, with families heading off for breaks and staycations.

angles.name: Holiday Mode
angles.copy: School's out for summer! Are you jetting off or enjoying a staycation this year?

angles.name: Summer Plans
angles.copy: The great British summer holiday is officially underway for many! What are your plans for the long break?
